testcase.name: [CapstoneProject2-RestfulBooker] Restful Booker - Guest User - Positive Scenarios › SCN1: Guest views available rooms for selected dates
[CapstoneProject2-RestfulBooker] Restful Booker - Guest User - Positive Scenarios › SCN2: Guest completes a successful room booking

failure.message: guest.spec.ts:65:21 SCN2: Guest completes a successful room booking

testcase.failure:
[CapstoneProject2-RestfulBooker] › scripts/CapstoneProjects/RestfulBooker/guest.spec.ts:65:21 › Restful Booker - Guest User - Positive Scenarios › SCN2: Guest completes a successful room booking
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: 'Reserve Now' }).nth(1)
at pages/RestfulBooker/RoomPage.ts:78
76 | await this.emailInput.fill(email); // Fills in the email 77 | await this.phoneInput.fill(phone); // Fills in the phone number > 78 | await this.submitBookingButton.click(); // Clicks the "Reserve Now" button to submit the booking | ^ 79 | } 80 | 81 | } at RoomPage.bookRoom (/home/tanaya/playwright/pages/RestfulBooker/RoomPage.ts:78:40) at /home/tanaya/playwright/scripts/CapstoneProjects/RestfulBooker/guest.spec.ts:91:5
